unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* WIP, experimental: use recvmmsg() on linux * we have no configure check, yet * and also it is only available for _GNU_SOURCE, which * we do not use otherwise. #define HAVE_SENDMMSG */
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */

function.name: Curl_quic_ver
vquic_ctx_init
do_sendmsg
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct cf_quic_ctx *qctx, const uint8_t *pkt, size_t pktlen, size_t gsolen, size_t *psent)

function.name: send_packet_no_gso
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct cf_quic_ctx *qctx, const uint8_t *pkt, size_t pktlen, size_t gsolen, size_t *psent)

function.name: vquic_send_packets
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct cf_quic_ctx *qctx, const uint8_t *pkt, size_t pktlen, size_t gsolen, size_t *psent)

function.name: vquic_flush
vquic_send
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct cf_quic_ctx *qctx, size_t gsolen)

function.name: vquic_send_tail_split
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct cf_quic_ctx *qctx, size_t gsolen, size_t tail_len, size_t tail_gsolen)

function.name: recvmmsg_packets
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct cf_quic_ctx *qctx, size_t max_pkts, vquic_recv_pkt_cb *recv_cb, void *userp)

function.name: recvmsg_packets
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct cf_quic_ctx *qctx, size_t max_pkts, vquic_recv_pkt_cb *recv_cb, void *userp)

function.name: recvfrom_packets
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct cf_quic_ctx *qctx, size_t max_pkts, vquic_recv_pkt_cb *recv_cb, void *userp)

function.name: vquic_recv_packets
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct cf_quic_ctx *qctx, size_t max_pkts, vquic_recv_pkt_cb *recv_cb, void *userp)

unit.comment: /* * If the QLOGDIR environment variable is set, open and return a file * descriptor to write the log to. * * This function returns error if something failed outside of failing to * create the file. Open file success is deemed by seeing if the returned fd * is != -1. */

function.name: Curl_qlogdir
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, unsigned char *scid, size_t scidlen, int *qlogfdp)

function.name: Curl_cf_quic_create
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter **pcf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *conn, const struct Curl_addrinfo *ai, int transport)

function.name: Curl_conn_is_http3
Curl_conn_may_http3
Curl_conn_may_http3
